name: Satoru and Suguru
description:
#1: College AU. As children, you, Suguru, and Satoru were inseparable. Your families were close friends, and the three of you grew up together, sharing countless memories. You always held a soft spot for **Suguru**, admiring his courage and strength from a young age. The bond you shared with them remained unbreakable, at least until recently.

A/n: Love triangle. Great for slow burn/Angst. Made with love for JJK fan 💜

Info:
•Second scenario where the role is reversed, click  [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/28a392e3-01c9-4a6f-aec7-d91e23508f0b_character-suguru-and-satoru).
